files.src/App.css: :root{color-scheme:dark}*{box-sizing:border-box}html,body{margin:0;min-height:100%;background:#020617;font-family:system-ui,-apple-system,Segoe UI,Roboto,sans-serif}.main{min-height:100vh;display:grid;place-items:center;padding:24px;color:#e5e7eb}.section{width:min(100%,620px);display:grid;gap:16px}.section h1{margin:0;font-size:22px}.card{display:grid;gap:14px;padding:18px;border:1px solid #334155;border-radius:16px;background:#0b1020}.input-row{display:flex;gap:8px}.input{min-width:0;flex:1;padding:10px 12px;border:1px solid #475569;border-radius:10px;background:#020617;color:#f8fafc}.input:focus,.edit-input:focus,button:focus-visible{outline:3px solid #facc15;outline-offset:2px}.primary,.filter-button,.ghost,.undo-button{border:0;border-radius:9px;padding:9px 12px;font-weight:700;cursor:pointer}.primary{background:#a3e635;color:#172554}.primary:disabled,.clear-completed:disabled{opacity:.45;cursor:not-allowed}.instructions{margin:0;color:#94a3b8;font-size:12px}.list{list-style:none;margin:0;padding:0;display:grid;gap:8px}.item{display:grid;grid-template-columns:minmax(0,1fr) auto;align-items:center;gap:10px;padding:10px;border:1px solid #1e293b;border-radius:11px;background:#020617}.item-main{min-width:0;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:9px}.todo-checkbox{inline-size:18px;block-size:18px;accent-color:#84cc16}.todo-text{overflow-wrap:anywhere}.todo-text.done{text-decoration:line-through;color:#94a3b8}.item-actions{display:flex;gap:6px}.ghost,.filter-button{border:1px solid #475569;background:transparent;color:#e2e8f0}.edit-input{width:100%;padding:7px 9px;border:1px solid #64748b;border-radius:8px;background:#111827;color:#f8fafc}.empty{margin:0;padding:12px;text-align:center;color:#94a3b8}.footer{display:grid;gap:10px}.filters{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:7px}.filter-button[aria-pressed="true"]{border-color:#a3e635;background:#365314;color:#ecfccb}.footer-row{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;gap:10px}.items-left{margin:0;color:#cbd5e1;font-size:13px}.clear-completed{padding:7px 10px}.undo-bar{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;gap:12px;padding:10px 12px;border:1px solid #ca8a04;border-radius:10px;background:#422006;color:#fef9c3}.undo-button{background:#facc15;color:#422006}.visually-hidden{position:absolute;width:1px;height:1px;padding:0;margin:-1px;overflow:hidden;clip:rect(0,0,0,0);white-space:nowrap;border:0}@media(max-width:520px){.main{padding:14px}.input-row{align-items:stretch;flex-direction:column}.item{grid-template-columns:1fr}.item-actions{justify-content:flex-end}}
